title: Amplifive
subtitle: By Digitaraya
description: Amplifive is a series of activities from the 1000 Startup Movement where each city throughout Indonesia and I as a representative of Makassar City were invited to do networking and pitching in front of panelists namely Yansem Kamto (Kibar CEO), Veronica Utami (Google Indonesia Head of Marketing), Achmad Rouzni Noor II (Managing Editor detikINET), Steven Vanada (Vice President of Cyber Ventures) and Enda Nasution (Executive Director of 1000 Digital Startups) who acted as the Mistery Judge.

title: TheNextDev
subtitle: By Telkomsel
description: The NextDev is a search for and development of the best indonesia technology startup in social impact in 2017 the three of us (Arif Rahmat, Nani Rahayu, Robi Kurniawan) were selected as the top 20 finalists representing the city of Makassar to compete with selected startups throughout Indonesia.

title: Berdayakan Petani Kopi Lokal #sapasulsel
subtitle: Kompas TV
description: A live interview on Kompas TV's #SapaSulsel segment, discussing how KopiTani empowers local coffee farmers in South Sulawesi by connecting them directly with coffee lovers through technology.

title: KopiTani, the platform that connects coffee lovers with Indonesian coffee farmers
subtitle: E27.co
description: Indonesian coffee trade industry is considered promising enough for KopiTani to build an e-commerce platform for. Simply put, the KopiTani solution is an online marketplace for original Indonesian coffee beans; the platform also includes an element of farmers empowerment with the DokterKopi feature on it. The platform currently offers two types of coffee beans: Green beans and coffee beans
